criminal_summary.case_numbers_xls: 1). FIR No. 63/2021, Tirupattur Town Police Station, Railway Station Road, Tirupattur, Tirupattur District. Sections 171(H), r/w REP PEOPLE ACT 123(1)(A)(a), 127(A)(4). Description: Distributed pamphlets without permission in TN02AM8008 INNOVA car in Tirupattur assembly constituency.; 2). FIR No. 53/2021, Tirupattur Town Police Station, Railway Station Road, Tirupattur, Tirupattur District. Sections 143, 171(F). Description: Brought three persons with him when submitting nomination papers to Tirupattur Sub-Collector's office, violating election rules.

ipc_charges: 1 charges related to Illegal payments in connection with an election (IPC Section-171H)
1 charges related to Punishment for undue influence or personation at an election (IPC Section-171F)
1 charges related to Punishment for Being member of an unlawful assembly (IPC Section-143)

discrepancies.title: Net Worth vs Income Reconciliation Failure
discrepancies.description: Calculated Net Worth is ₹42,034,052, but 5-year family income is only ₹11,200,793. Unexplained wealth discrepancy of ₹30,833,259.

discrepancies.title: Suspicious Property Undervaluation
discrepancies.description: Self Agricultural Land purchased in 2008 for ₹9,991,250 (CII Indexed Cost: ₹27,421,241) is severely undervalued at ₹11,000,000 (potential duty evasion).

discrepancies.title: Suspicious Property Overvaluation
discrepancies.description: Self Commercial Buildings purchased in 2024 for ₹266,300 (CII Indexed Cost: ₹275,837) is declared at highly inflated value of ₹10,000,000.

discrepancies.title: Disproportionate Recent Property Purchases
discrepancies.description: Properties purchased since 2020 cost ₹23,431,861, far exceeding the 5-yr total family income of ₹11,200,793.

discrepancies.title: Gold Heavily Undervalued (Tax/Duty Evasion)
